16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle Handbook Onboarding - Director Airgap Cloud Build
20	#
21	# Sequel to Your First Cloud Build (rbhodf). Teaches the airgap
22	# supply chain: enshrine upstream, conjure forge tethered, conjure
23	# airgap ifrit from enshrined forge, install into moriah, run the
24	# same 34-case security suite, compare plumb against tadmor baseline.
25	
26	set -euo pipefail
27	
28	test -z "${ZRBHODA_SOURCED:-}" || return 0
29	ZRBHODA_SOURCED=1
30	
31	rbho_director_airgap() {
32	  zrbho_sentinel
33	
34	  buc_doc_brief "Airgap Cloud Build — enshrine, conjure forge, conjure airgap, charge moriah, compare plumb"
35	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
36	
37	  local -r z_moniker="moriah"
38	  local -r z_tether_moniker="tadmor"
39	  local -r z_forge_vessel="rbev-bottle-ifrit-forge"
40	  local -r z_airgap_vessel="rbev-bottle-ifrit-airgap"
41	  local -r z_tether_vessel="rbev-bottle-ifrit-tether"
42	  local -r z_airgap_rbrv="${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}/${z_airgap_vessel}/rbrv.env"
43	  local -r z_moriah_rbrn="${RBBC_dot_dir}/${z_moniker}/${RBCC_rbrn_file}"
44	  local -r z_tether_rbrn="${RBBC_dot_dir}/${z_tether_moniker}/${RBCC_rbrn_file}"
45	
46	  local z_has_director=0
47	  local z_secrets_dir=""
48	  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
49	    z_secrets_dir=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_SECRETS_DIR") || z_secrets_dir=""
50	  fi
51	  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" && \
52	     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_director}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"; then
53	    z_has_director=1
54	  fi
55	
56	  local z_has_depot=0
57	  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
58	    local z_line=""
59	    while IFS= read -r z_line; do
60	      case "${z_line}" in RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID=?*) z_has_depot=1; break ;; esac
61	    done < "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"
62	  fi
63	
64	  local z_airgap_base_enshrined=0
65	  if test -f "${z_airgap_rbrv}"; then
66	    local z_anchor=""
67	    z_anchor=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${z_airgap_rbrv}" "RBRV_IMAGE_1_ANCHOR") || z_anchor=""
68	    test -n "${z_anchor}" && z_airgap_base_enshrined=1
69	  fi
70	
71	  local z_airgap_ordained=0
72	  if test -f "${z_moriah_rbrn}"; then
73	    local z_moriah_hallmark=""
74	    z_moriah_hallmark=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${z_moriah_rbrn}" "RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK") || z_moriah_hallmark=""
75	    case "${z_moriah_hallmark}" in
76	      ""|PENDING-*) ;;
77	      *) z_airgap_ordained=1 ;;
78	    esac
79	  fi
80	
81	  local z_tether_ready=0
82	  local z_tether_hallmark=""
83	  if test -f "${z_tether_rbrn}"; then
84	    z_tether_hallmark=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${z_tether_rbrn}" "RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK") || z_tether_hallmark=""
85	    case "${z_tether_hallmark}" in
86	      ""|PENDING-*) z_tether_hallmark="" ;;
87	      *) z_tether_ready=1 ;;
88	    esac
89	  fi
90	
91	  buyy_link_yawp "${RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL}" "Vessel"    "${z_forge_vessel}";   local -r z_lk_forge="${z_buym_yelp}"
92	  buyy_link_yawp "${RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL}" "Vessel"    "${z_airgap_vessel}";  local -r z_lk_airgap="${z_buym_yelp}"
93	  buyy_link_yawp "${RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL}" "Vessel"    "${z_tether_vessel}";  local -r z_lk_tether_v="${z_buym_yelp}"
94	  buyy_link_yawp "${RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL}" "Nameplate" "${z_moniker}";        local -r z_lk_moriah="${z_buym_yelp}"
95	  buyy_link_yawp "${RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL}" "Nameplate" "${z_tether_moniker}"; local -r z_lk_tadmor="${z_buym_yelp}"
96	
97	  buh_section "Airgap Cloud Build — Your Own Supply Chain"
98	  buh_e
99	  buh_line "In Your First Cloud Build you ${RBYC_ORDAIN}ed a ${RBYC_VESSEL} on the"
100	  buh_line "${RBYC_TETHERED} pool — Cloud Build pulled base images from the"
101	  buh_line "public internet during the build. ${RBYC_AIRGAP} removes that"
102	  buh_line "dependency: zero network during the build, every input pre-staged"
103	  buh_line "in your ${RBYC_DEPOT}."
104	  buh_e
105	  buh_line "This track builds ${z_lk_airgap} — the ${RBYC_BOTTLE} variant that"
106	  buh_line "matches the ifrit you met in the ${z_lk_tadmor} adversarial suite,"
107	  buh_line "now with full supply-chain discipline. The chain has three links:"
108	  buh_e
109	  buh_line "  1. Mirror the rust base from upstream into your ${RBYC_DEPOT} (${RBYC_ENSHRINE})"
110	  buh_line "  2. Build a project-authored toolchain image (the forge) ${RBYC_TETHERED}"
111	  buh_line "  3. Build the airgap ${RBYC_BOTTLE} ${RBYC_AIRGAP} from the enshrined forge"
112	  buh_e
113	  buh_line "Then drive the resulting ${RBYC_HALLMARK} into the ${z_lk_moriah}"
114	  buh_line "${RBYC_NAMEPLATE} and run the same 34 containment attacks against"
115	  buh_line "it that you ran against ${z_lk_tadmor}."
116	  buh_e
117	
118	  buh_line "Prerequisites:"
119	  buh_e
120	  if test "${z_has_director}" = "1"; then
121	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${RBYC_DIRECTOR} credential installed"
122	  else
123	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}${RBYC_DIRECTOR} credential missing — run:"
124	    buh_tt "      " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_CRED_DIRECTOR}"
125	  fi
126	  if test "${z_has_depot}" = "1"; then
127	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${RBYC_DEPOT} configured (RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID populated)"
128	  else
129	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}${RBYC_DEPOT} not configured — the ${RBYC_PAYOR} must establish the ${RBYC_DEPOT}:"
130	    buh_tt "      " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_PAYOR_HB}"
131	  fi
132	  buh_e
133	  buh_line "This track assumes you have completed Your First Cloud Build —"
134	  buh_line "the ${RBYC_RELIQUARY} is inscribed and you have ${RBYC_ORDAIN}ed at least"
135	  buh_line "one ${RBYC_VESSEL} on the ${RBYC_TETHERED} pool."
136	  buh_e
137	
138	  if test "${z_has_director}" = "0" || test "${z_has_depot}" = "0"; then
139	    buh_error "Complete the prerequisites above before continuing."
140	    buh_e
141	    buh_tt "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
142	    buh_e
143	    return 0
144	  fi
145	
146	  buh_line "Configure this handbook session:"
147	  buh_e
148	  buh_code "   export ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_NAMEPLATE_NAME}=${z_moniker}"
149	  buh_e
150	  buh_line "The ${RBYC_CHARGE} and suite commands below reference the ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE}"
151	  buh_line "by name. The two ${RBYC_VESSEL} names shift mid-track (forge →"
152	  buh_line "airgap), so vessels appear as literals in commands."
153	  buh_e
154	
155	  buh_step_style "Step " " — "
156	
157	  buh_step1 "${RBYC_ENSHRINE} the upstream base"
158	  buh_e
159	  buh_line "The airgap chain starts with ownership. ${RBYC_ENSHRINE} mirrors"
160	  buh_line "an upstream image — here rust:slim-bookworm — into your ${RBYC_DEPOT}"
161	  buh_line "under a content-addressed anchor. Once enshrined, builds pull the"
162	  buh_line "base from your ${RBYC_DEPOT} without touching the public internet."
163	  buh_e
164	  buh_line "The forge ${RBYC_VESSEL} ${z_lk_forge} declares its upstream base in"
165	  buh_line "its ${RBYC_RBRV} file:"
166	  buh_e
167	  buh_code "   RBRV_IMAGE_1_ORIGIN=rust:slim-bookworm"
168	  buh_code "   RBRV_IMAGE_1_ANCHOR=rust-slim-bookworm-5ae2d2ef98"
169	  buh_e
170	  buh_line "ORIGIN names where the image comes from; ANCHOR is the name it"
171	  buh_line "takes inside your ${RBYC_DEPOT}. Run ${RBYC_ENSHRINE}:"
172	  buh_e
173	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_ENSHRINE_VESSEL}"
174	  buh_e
175	  buh_line "${RBYC_ENSHRINE} sweeps every ${RBYC_VESSEL} ${RBYC_REGIME}, resolves the"
176	  buh_line "upstream bases they declare, and creates the mirror tags. It's"
177	  buh_line "idempotent — already-enshrined bases are skipped."
178	  buh_e
179	
180	  buh_step1 "${RBYC_CONJURE} the forge ${RBYC_TETHERED}, then ${RBYC_ENSHRINE} its result"
181	  buh_e
182	  buh_line "The forge is a project-authored toolchain image. It pre-stages"
183	  buh_line "apt packages and warms the cargo cache so the airgap build"
184	  buh_line "downstream has nothing to fetch."
185	  buh_e
186	  buh_line "Build it on the ${RBYC_TETHERED} pool — the forge ${RBYC_RBRV} declares:"
187	  buh_e
188	  buh_code "   RBRV_EGRESS_MODE=tether"
189	  buh_e
190	  buh_line "${RBYC_ORDAIN} reads this and routes to the ${RBYC_TETHERED} pool:"
191	  buh_e
192	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK}" "" " ${z_forge_vessel}"
193	  buh_e
194	  buh_line "Wall-clock ~15-20 minutes across the declared platforms. The"
195	  buh_line "forge is toolchain plumbing that your customer code will be"
196	  buh_line "built against — it is not itself customer code, which is why"
197	  buh_line "${RBYC_TETHERED} build is acceptable at this layer."
198	  buh_e
199	  buh_line "Now bridge: the airgap ${RBYC_VESSEL} ${z_lk_airgap} declares the"
200	  buh_line "forge as its base:"
201	  buh_e
202	  buh_code "   RBRV_IMAGE_1_ORIGIN=rbev-bottle-ifrit-forge"
203	  buh_code "   RBRV_IMAGE_1_ANCHOR="
204	  buh_e
205	  buh_line "ANCHOR starts empty because it resolves to the forge's freshly"
206	  buh_line "built ${RBYC_HALLMARK}. Re-run ${RBYC_ENSHRINE} to populate it:"
207	  buh_e
208	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_ENSHRINE_VESSEL}"
209	  buh_e
210	  buh_line "This time ${RBYC_ENSHRINE} sees the internal reference, finds the"
211	  buh_line "forge ${RBYC_HALLMARK} in your ${RBYC_DEPOT}, and writes the resolved"
212	  buh_line "anchor into the airgap vessel's ${RBYC_RBRV}. Commit that change."
213	  buh_e
214	  if test "${z_airgap_base_enshrined}" = "1"; then
215	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}Airgap base anchor populated — forge is ready to serve as airgap base"
216	  else
217	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}Airgap base anchor empty — ${RBYC_CONJURE} the forge and re-run ${RBYC_ENSHRINE}"
218	  fi
219	  buh_e
220	
221	  buh_step1 "${RBYC_CONJURE} the airgap ${RBYC_BOTTLE} ${RBYC_AIRGAP}"
222	  buh_e
223	  buh_line "Now the airgap build has everything it needs inside your"
224	  buh_line "${RBYC_DEPOT} — rust toolchain, apt packages, cargo cache, all"
225	  buh_line "pre-staged in the enshrined forge."
226	  buh_e
227	  buh_line "The airgap ${RBYC_VESSEL}'s Dockerfile starts FROM the forge:"
228	  buh_e
229	  buh_code "   ARG RBF_IMAGE_1"
230	  buh_code "   FROM \${RBF_IMAGE_1}"
231	  buh_e
232	  buh_line "RBF_IMAGE_1 is resolved from RBRV_IMAGE_1_ANCHOR at build time."
233	  buh_line "The airgap pool has zero external network — Cloud Build reaches"
234	  buh_line "your ${RBYC_DEPOT} and nothing else."
235	  buh_e
236	  buh_line "${RBYC_ORDAIN}:"
237	  buh_e
238	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK}" "" " ${z_airgap_vessel}"
239	  buh_e
240	  buh_line "Another ~15-20 minutes. The ${RBYC_VOUCH} at the end attests both"
241	  buh_line "the SLSA ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} chain and the airgap condition — that"
242	  buh_line "the build saw no public internet."
243	  buh_e
244	  buh_line "Your customer code was compiled against a supply chain you"
245	  buh_line "controlled end-to-end."
246	  buh_e
247	
248	  buh_step1 "Install the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} into ${z_lk_moriah} and run the security suite"
249	  buh_e
250	  buh_line "The cloud-built ${RBYC_HALLMARK} is now in your ${RBYC_DEPOT}. The"
251	  buh_line "${z_lk_moriah} ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE} names how that ${RBYC_HALLMARK} runs as"
252	  buh_line "a ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE}. ${RBYC_HALLMARK} and ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE} are separate"
253	  buh_line "artifacts — one is the build product, the other is the deployment"
254	  buh_line "config."
255	  buh_e
256	  buh_line "Read the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} from the fact file ${RBYC_ORDAIN} wrote:"
257	  buh_e
258	  buh_code "   export ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_NAME}=\$(cat ${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/${RBF_FACT_HALLMARK})"
259	  buh_e
260	  buyy_cmd_yawp "${z_moriah_rbrn}"; local -r z_lk_moriah_file="${z_buym_yelp}"
261	  buh_line "Open ${z_lk_moriah_file} and set the ${RBYC_BOTTLE} hallmark, replacing"
262	  buh_line "the PENDING-ordination placeholder:"
263	  buh_e
264	  buh_code "   RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK=${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_REF}"
265	  buh_e
266	  buh_line "Commit the change."
267	  buh_e
268	  if test "${z_airgap_ordained}" = "1"; then
269	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${z_lk_moriah} ${RBYC_BOTTLE} hallmark installed"
270	  else
271	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}${z_lk_moriah} ${RBYC_BOTTLE} hallmark is PENDING-ordination — install it above"
272	  fi
273	  buh_e
274	  buh_line "${RBYC_CHARGE} ${z_lk_moriah} with the airgap-built image:"
275	  buh_e
276	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_CHARGE}" "${z_moniker}"
277	  buh_e
278	  buh_line "Run the full 34-case security suite — the same suite you ran"
279	  buh_line "against ${z_lk_tadmor} with kludged ${RBYC_HALLMARKS}:"
280	  buh_e
281	  buh_tt "   " "rbtd-r" "${z_moniker}"
282	  buh_e
283	  buh_line "Expect green across the board. Same attacks, same containment"
284	  buh_line "boundaries, same expected responses — now against a ${RBYC_BOTTLE}"
285	  buh_line "built with full airgap supply-chain discipline."
286	  buh_e
287	  buh_line "This closes the loop: you built the validated airgap security"
288	  buh_line "infrastructure yourself. Containment holds regardless of how the"
289	  buh_line "${RBYC_HALLMARK} was produced."
290	  buh_e
291	
292	  buh_step1 "Compare ${RBYC_PLUMB} output — ${RBYC_TETHERED} vs ${RBYC_AIRGAP}"
293	  buh_e
294	  buh_line "${RBYC_PLUMB} displays the ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} evidence attached to a"
295	  buh_line "${RBYC_HALLMARK}. Run it against ${z_lk_moriah}'s airgap ${RBYC_BOTTLE}"
296	  buh_line "alongside ${z_lk_tadmor}'s ${RBYC_TETHERED} ${RBYC_BOTTLE} to see what"
297	  buh_line "airgap adds to the record."
298	  buh_e
299	  if test "${z_tether_ready}" = "1"; then
300	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${z_lk_tadmor} bottle hallmark available for comparison"
301	  else
302	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}${z_lk_tadmor} has no bottle hallmark — run the ${z_lk_tadmor} track first for the full comparison"
303	  fi
304	  buh_e
305	  buh_line "Airgap ${RBYC_BOTTLE} full ${RBYC_PROVENANCE}:"
306	  buh_e
307	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_PLUMB_FULL}" "" " ${z_airgap_vessel} ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_REF}"
308	  buh_e
309	  if test "${z_tether_ready}" = "1"; then
310	    buyy_cmd_yawp "${z_tether_hallmark}"; local -r z_lk_tether_hallmark="${z_buym_yelp}"
311	    buh_line "Tethered ${RBYC_BOTTLE} — ${z_lk_tadmor}'s current bottle ${RBYC_HALLMARK} is ${z_lk_tether_hallmark}:"
312	    buh_e
313	    buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_PLUMB_FULL}" "" " ${z_tether_vessel} ${z_tether_hallmark}"
314	    buh_e
315	  else
316	    buyy_cmd_yawp "${z_tether_rbrn}"; local -r z_lk_tether_file="${z_buym_yelp}"
317	    buh_line "Tethered ${RBYC_BOTTLE} — once ${z_lk_tadmor} is ${RBYC_CHARGE}d, read RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK"
318	    buh_line "from ${z_lk_tether_file} and plumb it:"
319	    buh_e
320	    buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_PLUMB_FULL}" "" " ${z_tether_vessel} <tadmor-hallmark>"
321	    buh_e
322	  fi
323	  buh_line "What to look for, side by side:"
324	  buh_e
325	  buh_line "  ${RBYC_SBOM}       Same rust/cargo package set if both ${RBYC_HALLMARKS}"
326	  buh_line "              were ${RBYC_CONJURED}. The ifrit binary is functionally"
327	  buh_line "              equivalent either way."
328	  buh_e
329	  buh_line "  Build info  The airgap ${RBYC_HALLMARK} records a sealed supply"
330	  buh_line "              chain — base digests resolved to your ${RBYC_DEPOT},"
331	  buh_line "              no upstream resolution during the build. A ${RBYC_TETHERED}"
332	  buh_line "              ${RBYC_HALLMARK} shows upstream resolution within the build"
333	  buh_line "              window. A kludged ${RBYC_HALLMARK} carries no Cloud Build"
334	  buh_line "              record at all."
335	  buh_e
336	  buh_line "  ${RBYC_PROVENANCE}  The airgap ${RBYC_VOUCH} attests the airgap condition"
337	  buh_line "              in addition to the standard SLSA chain. ${RBYC_TETHERED}"
338	  buh_line "              ${RBYC_VOUCHED} ${RBYC_HALLMARKS} carry SLSA without that"
339	  buh_line "              extra attestation."
340	  buh_e
341	  buh_line "For a compact summary:"
342	  buh_e
343	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_PLUMB_COMPACT}" "" " ${z_airgap_vessel} ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_REF}"
344	  buh_e
345	
346	  buh_section "What you learned"
347	  buh_e
348	  buh_line "You built an airgap supply chain end to end:"
349	  buh_e
350	  buh_line "  1. ${RBYC_ENSHRINE} — rust upstream base mirrored into your ${RBYC_DEPOT}"
351	  buh_line "  2. Forge ${RBYC_CONJURE} — project toolchain image built ${RBYC_TETHERED}"
352	  buh_line "  3. Airgap ${RBYC_CONJURE} — customer code built with zero external network"
353	  buh_line "  4. ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE} install + ${RBYC_CHARGE} — runtime config assembled, suite green"
354	  buh_line "  5. ${RBYC_PLUMB} comparison — airgap ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} visible against the ${RBYC_TETHERED} baseline"
355	  buh_e
356	  buh_line "The same 34 containment attacks pass against a ${RBYC_BOTTLE} you"
357	  buh_line "built with discipline over your entire supply chain. The attack"
358	  buh_line "surface is the ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE}; the build ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} is separate"
359	  buh_line "evidence about how the ${RBYC_BOTTLE} came to exist."
360	  buh_e
361	
362	  buh_tt "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
363	  buh_e
364	}
365	
366	# eof
367

file.content:
#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# Recipe Bottle Handbook Onboarding - Director Airgap Cloud Build
#
# Sequel to Your First Cloud Build (rbhodf). Teaches the airgap
# supply chain: enshrine upstream, conjure forge tethered, conjure
# airgap ifrit from enshrined forge, install into moriah, run the
# same 34-case security suite, compare plumb against tadmor baseline.

set -euo pipefail

test -z "${ZRBHODA_SOURCED:-}" || return 0
ZRBHODA_SOURCED=1

rbho_director_airgap() {
  zrbho_sentinel

  buc_doc_brief "Airgap Cloud Build — enshrine, conjure forge, conjure airgap, charge moriah, compare plumb"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  local -r z_moniker="moriah"
  local -r z_tether_moniker="tadmor"
  local -r z_forge_vessel="rbev-bottle-ifrit-forge"
  local -r z_airgap_vessel="rbev-bottle-ifrit-airgap"
  local -r z_tether_vessel="rbev-bottle-ifrit-tether"
  local -r z_airgap_rbrv="${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}/${z_airgap_vessel}/rbrv.env"
  local -r z_moriah_rbrn="${RBBC_dot_dir}/${z_moniker}/${RBCC_rbrn_file}"
  local -r z_tether_rbrn="${RBBC_dot_dir}/${z_tether_moniker}/${RBCC_rbrn_file}"

  local z_has_director=0
  local z_secrets_dir=""
  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
    z_secrets_dir=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_SECRETS_DIR") || z_secrets_dir=""
  fi
  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" && \
     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_director}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"; then
    z_has_director=1
  fi

  local z_has_depot=0
  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
    local z_line=""
    while IFS= read -r z_line; do
      case "${z_line}" in RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID=?*) z_has_depot=1; break ;; esac
    done < "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"
  fi

  local z_airgap_base_enshrined=0
  if test -f "${z_airgap_rbrv}"; then
    local z_anchor=""
    z_anchor=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${z_airgap_rbrv}" "RBRV_IMAGE_1_ANCHOR") || z_anchor=""
    test -n "${z_anchor}" && z_airgap_base_enshrined=1
  fi

  local z_airgap_ordained=0
  if test -f "${z_moriah_rbrn}"; then
    local z_moriah_hallmark=""
    z_moriah_hallmark=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${z_moriah_rbrn}" "RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK") || z_moriah_hallmark=""
    case "${z_moriah_hallmark}" in
      ""|PENDING-*) ;;
      *) z_airgap_ordained=1 ;;
    esac
  fi

  local z_tether_ready=0
  local z_tether_hallmark=""
  if test -f "${z_tether_rbrn}"; then
    z_tether_hallmark=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${z_tether_rbrn}" "RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK") || z_tether_hallmark=""
    case "${z_tether_hallmark}" in
      ""|PENDING-*) z_tether_hallmark="" ;;
      *) z_tether_ready=1 ;;
    esac
  fi

  buyy_link_yawp "${RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL}" "Vessel"    "${z_forge_vessel}";   local -r z_lk_forge="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_link_yawp "${RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL}" "Vessel"    "${z_airgap_vessel}";  local -r z_lk_airgap="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_link_yawp "${RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL}" "Vessel"    "${z_tether_vessel}";  local -r z_lk_tether_v="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_link_yawp "${RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL}" "Nameplate" "${z_moniker}";        local -r z_lk_moriah="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_link_yawp "${RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL}" "Nameplate" "${z_tether_moniker}"; local -r z_lk_tadmor="${z_buym_yelp}"

  buh_section "Airgap Cloud Build — Your Own Supply Chain"
  buh_e
  buh_line "In Your First Cloud Build you ${RBYC_ORDAIN}ed a ${RBYC_VESSEL} on the"
  buh_line "${RBYC_TETHERED} pool — Cloud Build pulled base images from the"
  buh_line "public internet during the build. ${RBYC_AIRGAP} removes that"
  buh_line "dependency: zero network during the build, every input pre-staged"
  buh_line "in your ${RBYC_DEPOT}."
  buh_e
  buh_line "This track builds ${z_lk_airgap} — the ${RBYC_BOTTLE} variant that"
  buh_line "matches the ifrit you met in the ${z_lk_tadmor} adversarial suite,"
  buh_line "now with full supply-chain discipline. The chain has three links:"
  buh_e
  buh_line "  1. Mirror the rust base from upstream into your ${RBYC_DEPOT} (${RBYC_ENSHRINE})"
  buh_line "  2. Build a project-authored toolchain image (the forge) ${RBYC_TETHERED}"
  buh_line "  3. Build the airgap ${RBYC_BOTTLE} ${RBYC_AIRGAP} from the enshrined forge"
  buh_e
  buh_line "Then drive the resulting ${RBYC_HALLMARK} into the ${z_lk_moriah}"
  buh_line "${RBYC_NAMEPLATE} and run the same 34 containment attacks against"
  buh_line "it that you ran against ${z_lk_tadmor}."
  buh_e

  buh_line "Prerequisites:"
  buh_e
  if test "${z_has_director}" = "1"; then
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${RBYC_DIRECTOR} credential installed"
  else
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}${RBYC_DIRECTOR} credential missing — run:"
    buh_tt "      " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_CRED_DIRECTOR}"
  fi
  if test "${z_has_depot}" = "1"; then
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${RBYC_DEPOT} configured (RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID populated)"
  else
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}${RBYC_DEPOT} not configured — the ${RBYC_PAYOR} must establish the ${RBYC_DEPOT}:"
    buh_tt "      " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_PAYOR_HB}"
  fi
  buh_e
  buh_line "This track assumes you have completed Your First Cloud Build —"
  buh_line "the ${RBYC_RELIQUARY} is inscribed and you have ${RBYC_ORDAIN}ed at least"
  buh_line "one ${RBYC_VESSEL} on the ${RBYC_TETHERED} pool."
  buh_e

  if test "${z_has_director}" = "0" || test "${z_has_depot}" = "0"; then
    buh_error "Complete the prerequisites above before continuing."
    buh_e
    buh_tt "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
    buh_e
    return 0
  fi

  buh_line "Configure this handbook session:"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   export ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_NAMEPLATE_NAME}=${z_moniker}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "The ${RBYC_CHARGE} and suite commands below reference the ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE}"
  buh_line "by name. The two ${RBYC_VESSEL} names shift mid-track (forge →"
  buh_line "airgap), so vessels appear as literals in commands."
  buh_e

  buh_step_style "Step " " — "

  buh_step1 "${RBYC_ENSHRINE} the upstream base"
  buh_e
  buh_line "The airgap chain starts with ownership. ${RBYC_ENSHRINE} mirrors"
  buh_line "an upstream image — here rust:slim-bookworm — into your ${RBYC_DEPOT}"
  buh_line "under a content-addressed anchor. Once enshrined, builds pull the"
  buh_line "base from your ${RBYC_DEPOT} without touching the public internet."
  buh_e
  buh_line "The forge ${RBYC_VESSEL} ${z_lk_forge} declares its upstream base in"
  buh_line "its ${RBYC_RBRV} file:"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   RBRV_IMAGE_1_ORIGIN=rust:slim-bookworm"
  buh_code "   RBRV_IMAGE_1_ANCHOR=rust-slim-bookworm-5ae2d2ef98"
  buh_e
  buh_line "ORIGIN names where the image comes from; ANCHOR is the name it"
  buh_line "takes inside your ${RBYC_DEPOT}. Run ${RBYC_ENSHRINE}:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_ENSHRINE_VESSEL}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_ENSHRINE} sweeps every ${RBYC_VESSEL} ${RBYC_REGIME}, resolves the"
  buh_line "upstream bases they declare, and creates the mirror tags. It's"
  buh_line "idempotent — already-enshrined bases are skipped."
  buh_e

  buh_step1 "${RBYC_CONJURE} the forge ${RBYC_TETHERED}, then ${RBYC_ENSHRINE} its result"
  buh_e
  buh_line "The forge is a project-authored toolchain image. It pre-stages"
  buh_line "apt packages and warms the cargo cache so the airgap build"
  buh_line "downstream has nothing to fetch."
  buh_e
  buh_line "Build it on the ${RBYC_TETHERED} pool — the forge ${RBYC_RBRV} declares:"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   RBRV_EGRESS_MODE=tether"
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_ORDAIN} reads this and routes to the ${RBYC_TETHERED} pool:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK}" "" " ${z_forge_vessel}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "Wall-clock ~15-20 minutes across the declared platforms. The"
  buh_line "forge is toolchain plumbing that your customer code will be"
  buh_line "built against — it is not itself customer code, which is why"
  buh_line "${RBYC_TETHERED} build is acceptable at this layer."
  buh_e
  buh_line "Now bridge: the airgap ${RBYC_VESSEL} ${z_lk_airgap} declares the"
  buh_line "forge as its base:"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   RBRV_IMAGE_1_ORIGIN=rbev-bottle-ifrit-forge"
  buh_code "   RBRV_IMAGE_1_ANCHOR="
  buh_e
  buh_line "ANCHOR starts empty because it resolves to the forge's freshly"
  buh_line "built ${RBYC_HALLMARK}. Re-run ${RBYC_ENSHRINE} to populate it:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_ENSHRINE_VESSEL}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "This time ${RBYC_ENSHRINE} sees the internal reference, finds the"
  buh_line "forge ${RBYC_HALLMARK} in your ${RBYC_DEPOT}, and writes the resolved"
  buh_line "anchor into the airgap vessel's ${RBYC_RBRV}. Commit that change."
  buh_e
  if test "${z_airgap_base_enshrined}" = "1"; then
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}Airgap base anchor populated — forge is ready to serve as airgap base"
  else
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}Airgap base anchor empty — ${RBYC_CONJURE} the forge and re-run ${RBYC_ENSHRINE}"
  fi
  buh_e

  buh_step1 "${RBYC_CONJURE} the airgap ${RBYC_BOTTLE} ${RBYC_AIRGAP}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "Now the airgap build has everything it needs inside your"
  buh_line "${RBYC_DEPOT} — rust toolchain, apt packages, cargo cache, all"
  buh_line "pre-staged in the enshrined forge."
  buh_e
  buh_line "The airgap ${RBYC_VESSEL}'s Dockerfile starts FROM the forge:"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   ARG RBF_IMAGE_1"
  buh_code "   FROM \${RBF_IMAGE_1}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "RBF_IMAGE_1 is resolved from RBRV_IMAGE_1_ANCHOR at build time."
  buh_line "The airgap pool has zero external network — Cloud Build reaches"
  buh_line "your ${RBYC_DEPOT} and nothing else."
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_ORDAIN}:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK}" "" " ${z_airgap_vessel}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "Another ~15-20 minutes. The ${RBYC_VOUCH} at the end attests both"
  buh_line "the SLSA ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} chain and the airgap condition — that"
  buh_line "the build saw no public internet."
  buh_e
  buh_line "Your customer code was compiled against a supply chain you"
  buh_line "controlled end-to-end."
  buh_e

  buh_step1 "Install the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} into ${z_lk_moriah} and run the security suite"
  buh_e
  buh_line "The cloud-built ${RBYC_HALLMARK} is now in your ${RBYC_DEPOT}. The"
  buh_line "${z_lk_moriah} ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE} names how that ${RBYC_HALLMARK} runs as"
  buh_line "a ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE}. ${RBYC_HALLMARK} and ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE} are separate"
  buh_line "artifacts — one is the build product, the other is the deployment"
  buh_line "config."
  buh_e
  buh_line "Read the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} from the fact file ${RBYC_ORDAIN} wrote:"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   export ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_NAME}=\$(cat ${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/${RBF_FACT_HALLMARK})"
  buh_e
  buyy_cmd_yawp "${z_moriah_rbrn}"; local -r z_lk_moriah_file="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buh_line "Open ${z_lk_moriah_file} and set the ${RBYC_BOTTLE} hallmark, replacing"
  buh_line "the PENDING-ordination placeholder:"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK=${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_REF}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "Commit the change."
  buh_e
  if test "${z_airgap_ordained}" = "1"; then
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${z_lk_moriah} ${RBYC_BOTTLE} hallmark installed"
  else
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}${z_lk_moriah} ${RBYC_BOTTLE} hallmark is PENDING-ordination — install it above"
  fi
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_CHARGE} ${z_lk_moriah} with the airgap-built image:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_CHARGE}" "${z_moniker}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "Run the full 34-case security suite — the same suite you ran"
  buh_line "against ${z_lk_tadmor} with kludged ${RBYC_HALLMARKS}:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "rbtd-r" "${z_moniker}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "Expect green across the board. Same attacks, same containment"
  buh_line "boundaries, same expected responses — now against a ${RBYC_BOTTLE}"
  buh_line "built with full airgap supply-chain discipline."
  buh_e
  buh_line "This closes the loop: you built the validated airgap security"
  buh_line "infrastructure yourself. Containment holds regardless of how the"
  buh_line "${RBYC_HALLMARK} was produced."
  buh_e

  buh_step1 "Compare ${RBYC_PLUMB} output — ${RBYC_TETHERED} vs ${RBYC_AIRGAP}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_PLUMB} displays the ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} evidence attached to a"
  buh_line "${RBYC_HALLMARK}. Run it against ${z_lk_moriah}'s airgap ${RBYC_BOTTLE}"
  buh_line "alongside ${z_lk_tadmor}'s ${RBYC_TETHERED} ${RBYC_BOTTLE} to see what"
  buh_line "airgap adds to the record."
  buh_e
  if test "${z_tether_ready}" = "1"; then
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${z_lk_tadmor} bottle hallmark available for comparison"
  else
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}${z_lk_tadmor} has no bottle hallmark — run the ${z_lk_tadmor} track first for the full comparison"
  fi
  buh_e
  buh_line "Airgap ${RBYC_BOTTLE} full ${RBYC_PROVENANCE}:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_PLUMB_FULL}" "" " ${z_airgap_vessel} ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_REF}"
  buh_e
  if test "${z_tether_ready}" = "1"; then
    buyy_cmd_yawp "${z_tether_hallmark}"; local -r z_lk_tether_hallmark="${z_buym_yelp}"
    buh_line "Tethered ${RBYC_BOTTLE} — ${z_lk_tadmor}'s current bottle ${RBYC_HALLMARK} is ${z_lk_tether_hallmark}:"
    buh_e
    buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_PLUMB_FULL}" "" " ${z_tether_vessel} ${z_tether_hallmark}"
    buh_e
  else
    buyy_cmd_yawp "${z_tether_rbrn}"; local -r z_lk_tether_file="${z_buym_yelp}"
    buh_line "Tethered ${RBYC_BOTTLE} — once ${z_lk_tadmor} is ${RBYC_CHARGE}d, read RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK"
    buh_line "from ${z_lk_tether_file} and plumb it:"
    buh_e
    buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_PLUMB_FULL}" "" " ${z_tether_vessel} <tadmor-hallmark>"
    buh_e
  fi
  buh_line "What to look for, side by side:"
  buh_e
  buh_line "  ${RBYC_SBOM}       Same rust/cargo package set if both ${RBYC_HALLMARKS}"
  buh_line "              were ${RBYC_CONJURED}. The ifrit binary is functionally"
  buh_line "              equivalent either way."
  buh_e
  buh_line "  Build info  The airgap ${RBYC_HALLMARK} records a sealed supply"
  buh_line "              chain — base digests resolved to your ${RBYC_DEPOT},"
  buh_line "              no upstream resolution during the build. A ${RBYC_TETHERED}"
  buh_line "              ${RBYC_HALLMARK} shows upstream resolution within the build"
  buh_line "              window. A kludged ${RBYC_HALLMARK} carries no Cloud Build"
  buh_line "              record at all."
  buh_e
  buh_line "  ${RBYC_PROVENANCE}  The airgap ${RBYC_VOUCH} attests the airgap condition"
  buh_line "              in addition to the standard SLSA chain. ${RBYC_TETHERED}"
  buh_line "              ${RBYC_VOUCHED} ${RBYC_HALLMARKS} carry SLSA without that"
  buh_line "              extra attestation."
  buh_e
  buh_line "For a compact summary:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_PLUMB_COMPACT}" "" " ${z_airgap_vessel} ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_REF}"
  buh_e

  buh_section "What you learned"
  buh_e
  buh_line "You built an airgap supply chain end to end:"
  buh_e
  buh_line "  1. ${RBYC_ENSHRINE} — rust upstream base mirrored into your ${RBYC_DEPOT}"
  buh_line "  2. Forge ${RBYC_CONJURE} — project toolchain image built ${RBYC_TETHERED}"
  buh_line "  3. Airgap ${RBYC_CONJURE} — customer code built with zero external network"
  buh_line "  4. ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE} install + ${RBYC_CHARGE} — runtime config assembled, suite green"
  buh_line "  5. ${RBYC_PLUMB} comparison — airgap ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} visible against the ${RBYC_TETHERED} baseline"
  buh_e
  buh_line "The same 34 containment attacks pass against a ${RBYC_BOTTLE} you"
  buh_line "built with discipline over your entire supply chain. The attack"
  buh_line "surface is the ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE}; the build ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} is separate"
  buh_line "evidence about how the ${RBYC_BOTTLE} came to exist."
  buh_e

  buh_tt "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
  buh_e
}

content.content:
1	#!/bin/bash
2	export BURD_LAUNCHER=".buk/launcher_nolog.rbw_workbench.sh"
3	export BURD_NO_LOG=1
4	exec "${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}/../${BURD_LAUNCHER}" "${0##*/}" "${@}"
5

1	#!/bin/bash
2	#
3	# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
4	#
5	# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
6	# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
7	# You may obtain a copy of the License at
8	#
9	#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
10	#
11	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
12	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle Handbook Onboarding - Director First Cloud Build
20	
21	set -euo pipefail
22	
23	test -z "${ZRBHODF_SOURCED:-}" || return 0
24	ZRBHODF_SOURCED=1
25	
26	rbho_director_first_build() {
27	  zrbho_sentinel
28	
29	  buc_doc_brief "Your First Cloud Build — inscribe, conjure, tour, summon, abjure"
30	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
31	
32	  local -r z_vessel="rbev-sentry-deb-tether"
33	
34	  local z_has_director=0
35	  local z_secrets_dir=""
36	  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
37	    z_secrets_dir=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_SECRETS_DIR") || z_secrets_dir=""
38	  fi
39	  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" && \
40	     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_director}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"; then
41	    z_has_director=1
42	  fi
43	
44	  local z_has_depot=0
45	  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
46	    local z_line=""
47	    while IFS= read -r z_line; do
48	      case "${z_line}" in RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID=?*) z_has_depot=1; break ;; esac
49	    done < "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"
50	  fi
51	
52	  local z_conjure_summoned=0
53	  if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
54	    local z_project_id=""
55	    local z_region=""
56	    if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
57	      z_project_id=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID") || z_project_id=""
58	      z_region=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_GCP_REGION") || z_region=""
59	    fi
60	    if test -n "${z_region}" && test -n "${z_project_id}"; then
61	      local -r z_gar_prefix="${z_region}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${z_project_id}/"
62	      local -r z_df_out="${ZRBHO_DOCKER_IMAGES_PREFIX}5_repotag.txt"
63	      local -r z_df_err="${ZRBHO_DOCKER_STDERR_PREFIX}7_repotag.txt"
64	      if docker images --format "{{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}}" \
65	           > "${z_df_out}" 2>"${z_df_err}"; then
66	        local z_line=""
67	        while IFS= read -r z_line || test -n "${z_line}"; do
68	          case "${z_line}" in
69	            "${z_gar_prefix}"*"${z_vessel}:c"[0-9]*) z_conjure_summoned=1; break ;;
70	          esac
71	        done < "${z_df_out}"
72	      fi
73	    fi
74	  fi
75	
76	  buyy_link_yawp "${RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL}" "Vessel" "${z_vessel}"; local -r z_lk_vessel_name="${z_buym_yelp}"
77	
78	  buh_section "Your First Cloud Build"
79	  buh_e
80	  buh_line "This track walks you through the complete ${RBYC_CONJURE} lifecycle:"
81	  buh_line "provision the builder toolchain, ${RBYC_ORDAIN} your first ${RBYC_VESSEL} via"
82	  buh_line "Cloud Build, inspect the result, pull it locally, and clean up."
83	  buh_e
84	  buh_line "You will build ${z_lk_vessel_name} — the same ${RBYC_SENTRY} you"
85	  buh_line "already know from the ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} track, but this time built by"
86	  buh_line "Google Cloud Build with full SLSA ${RBYC_PROVENANCE}."
87	  buh_e
88	
89	  buh_line "Prerequisites:"
90	  buh_e
91	  if test "${z_has_director}" = "1"; then
92	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${RBYC_DIRECTOR} credential installed"
93	  else
94	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}${RBYC_DIRECTOR} credential missing — run:"
95	    buh_tt "      " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_CRED_DIRECTOR}"
96	  fi
97	  if test "${z_has_depot}" = "1"; then
98	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${RBYC_DEPOT} configured (RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID populated)"
99	  else
100	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}${RBYC_DEPOT} not configured — the ${RBYC_PAYOR} must establish the ${RBYC_DEPOT}:"
101	    buh_tt "      " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_PAYOR_HB}"
102	  fi
103	  buh_e
104	
105	  if test "${z_has_director}" = "0" || test "${z_has_depot}" = "0"; then
106	    buh_error "Complete the prerequisites above before continuing."
107	    buh_e
108	    buh_tt "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
109	    buh_e
110	    return 0
111	  fi
112	
113	  buh_line "Configure this handbook session:"
114	  buh_e
115	  buh_code "   export ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_NAME}=${z_vessel}"
116	  buh_e
117	  buh_line "This sets the ${RBYC_VESSEL} you will build throughout the track."
118	  buh_line "The remaining steps reference it by name."
119	  buh_e
120	
121	  buh_step_style "Step " " — "
122	
123	  buh_step1 "Inscribe the ${RBYC_RELIQUARY}"
124	  buh_e
125	  buh_line "The ${RBYC_RELIQUARY} is a set of builder tool images (skopeo,"
126	  buh_line "docker, gcloud, syft) that Cloud Build uses during ${RBYC_VESSEL}"
127	  buh_line "construction. Without it, the ${RBYC_CONJURE} preflight check fails."
128	  buh_e
129	  buh_line "Think of it as installing the toolchain before your first build."
130	  buh_line "This is a one-time operation — once inscribed, the ${RBYC_RELIQUARY}"
131	  buh_line "stays in the ${RBYC_DEPOT} until you choose to refresh it."
132	  buh_e
133	  buh_line "Periodically re-inscribe to pick up newer tool versions. All ${RBYC_VESSELS}"
134	  buh_line "share the same ${RBYC_RELIQUARY} — one inscribe updates the toolchain"
135	  buh_line "for every build."
136	  buh_e
137	  buh_line "Inscribe:"
138	  buh_e
139	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_INSCRIBE_RELIQUARY}"
140	  buh_e
141	  buh_line "This mirrors four tool images from upstream into the ${RBYC_DEPOT}"
142	  buh_line "GAR namespace. Takes 2-5 minutes depending on network speed."
143	  buh_e
144	  buyy_cmd_yawp "r260324193326";                   local -r z_ds_example="${z_buym_yelp}"
145	  buh_line "When inscribe completes, it prints a ${RBYC_RELIQUARY} datestamp"
146	  buh_line "(e.g., ${z_ds_example}). Every ${RBYC_VESSEL} that uses Cloud Build"
147	  buh_line "needs this value in its ${RBYC_REGIME} file:"
148	  buh_e
149	  buh_code "   RBRV_RELIQUARY=<datestamp>"
150	  buh_e
151	  buyy_cmd_yawp "${z_vessel}/rbrv.env"; local -r z_rbrv_file="${z_buym_yelp}"
152	  buh_line "Open ${z_rbrv_file} and set the field,"
153	  buh_line "then commit the change."
154	  buh_e
155	
156	  buh_step1 "${RBYC_CONJURE} the ${RBYC_SENTRY}"
157	  buh_e
158	  buh_line "${RBYC_CONJURE} is the build mode where Cloud Build constructs a"
159	  buh_line "${RBYC_VESSEL} image from the project's Dockerfile and build context."
160	  buh_e
161	  buh_line "${RBYC_ORDAIN} is the command that triggers the full pipeline —"
162	  buh_line "it reads the ${RBYC_VESSEL} ${RBYC_RBRV} ${RBYC_REGIME} to determine the mode"
163	  buh_line "(${RBYC_CONJURE}, ${RBYC_BIND}, or ${RBYC_GRAFT}) and acts accordingly:"
164	  buh_e
165	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF}"
166	  buh_e
167	  buh_line "This builds on the ${RBYC_TETHERED} pool — Cloud Build has"
168	  buh_line "public internet access and pulls base images from upstream"
169	  buh_line "registries during the build. (The ${RBYC_AIRGAP} track removes"
170	  buh_line "that dependency.)"
171	  buh_e
172	  buh_line "The pipeline:"
173	  buh_e
174	  buh_line "  1. The host mints a ${RBYC_HALLMARK} — a timestamped tag"
175	  buh_line "     identifying this build"
176	  buh_line "  2. A ${RBYC_POUCH} (build context archive) is pushed to GAR"
177	  buh_line "  3. Cloud Build constructs the image across platforms"
178	  buh_line "  4. SLSA ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} is generated per platform digest"
179	  buh_line "  5. ${RBYC_VOUCH} verifies the ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} chain"
180	  buh_e
181	  buh_warn "Wall-clock: ~15-20 minutes for a 3-platform build."
182	  buh_line "The command blocks until Cloud Build finishes. Use the time"
183	  buh_line "to read ahead — the next steps explain what to look for."
184	  buh_e
185	
186	  buh_step1 "Capture the ${RBYC_HALLMARK}"
187	  buh_e
188	  buh_line "When ${RBYC_ORDAIN} completes, it writes the ${RBYC_HALLMARK}"
189	  buh_line "to the ${RBYC_OUTPUT} directory — a fixed-path staging area"
190	  buh_line "that each ${RBYC_TABTARGET} clears and recreates on entry."
191	  buh_line "Read the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} from the fact file and export it so"
192	  buh_line "you can copy-paste the commands in the remaining steps:"
193	  buh_e
194	  buh_code "   export ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_NAME}=\$(cat ${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/${RBF_FACT_HALLMARK})"
195	  buh_e
196	
197	  buh_step1 "Tour the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} artifacts"
198	  buh_e
199	  buh_line "Every ${RBYC_CONJURED} ${RBYC_HALLMARK} produces a set of tagged"
200	  buh_line "artifacts in GAR. Each suffix serves a specific role:"
201	  buh_e
202	  buyy_cmd_yawp "{hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_POUCH}";        local -r z_sfx_pouch="${z_buym_yelp}"
203	  buyy_cmd_yawp "{hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}";        local -r z_sfx_image="${z_buym_yelp}"
204	  buyy_cmd_yawp "{hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ATTEST}-{arch}"; local -r z_sfx_attest="${z_buym_yelp}"
205	  buyy_cmd_yawp "{hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}";        local -r z_sfx_about="${z_buym_yelp}"
206	  buyy_cmd_yawp "{hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_VOUCH}";        local -r z_sfx_vouch="${z_buym_yelp}"
207	  buyy_cmd_yawp "{hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_DIAGS}";        local -r z_sfx_diags="${z_buym_yelp}"
208	  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_pouch}"
209	  buh_line "      A FROM SCRATCH OCI image pushed from host to GAR before"
210	  buh_line "      the build. Contains the Dockerfile, scripts, and"
211	  buh_line "      configuration Cloud Build needs. Identical for ${RBYC_TETHERED}"
212	  buh_line "      and ${RBYC_AIRGAP} builds — the pool determines network"
213	  buh_line "      access, not the ${RBYC_POUCH}."
214	  buh_e
215	  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_image}"
216	  buh_line "      The consumer image — a multiplatform manifest list."
217	  buh_line "      This is what you pull and run."
218	  buh_e
219	  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_attest}"
220	  buh_line "      Per-platform ${RBYC_PROVENANCE}-carrying image (one per platform)."
221	  buh_line "      Shares all layers with -image — only the manifest differs."
222	  buh_line "      These carry the GCB-attested digests used by ${RBYC_VOUCH}."
223	  buh_e
224	  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_about}"
225	  buh_line "      ${RBYC_SBOM} (software bill of materials) + build info."
226	  buh_e
227	  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_vouch}"
228	  buh_line "      SLSA ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} verification record."
229	  buh_e
230	  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_diags}"
231	  buh_line "      Diagnostics from the build."
232	  buh_e
233	  buh_line "Inspect them:"
234	  buh_e
235	
236	  buh_step2 "${RBYC_TALLY}"
237	  buh_e
238	  buh_line "${RBYC_TALLY} lists all ${RBYC_HALLMARKS} and their health state:"
239	  buh_e
240	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_TALLY_HALLMARKS}"
241	  buh_e
242	  buh_line "Look for your ${RBYC_HALLMARK} with health state 'vouched' — that"
243	  buh_line "means SLSA ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} was verified."
244	  buh_e
245	
246	  buh_step2 "${RBYC_VOUCH}"
247	  buh_e
248	  buh_line "${RBYC_VOUCH} verifies SLSA ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} for each platform"
249	  buh_line "digest in the ${RBYC_HALLMARK}. The ${RBYC_ORDAIN} pipeline runs ${RBYC_VOUCH}"
250	  buh_line "automatically. If a build was interrupted before ${RBYC_VOUCH}"
251	  buh_line "completed, run this to reattempt ${RBYC_VOUCH} on untreated ${RBYC_HALLMARKS}:"
252	  buh_e
253	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_VOUCH_HALLMARKS}"
254	  buh_e
255	  buh_line "The ${RBYC_CONJURE} verdict is full SLSA — Cloud Build produced"
256	  buh_line "this image, and the ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} chain proves it."
257	  buh_e
258	
259	  buh_step2 "${RBYC_PLUMB}"
260	  buh_e
261	  buh_line "${RBYC_PLUMB} displays the ${RBYC_SBOM}, build info, and Dockerfile"
262	  buh_line "that produced the ${RBYC_HALLMARK}. Two modes:"
263	  buh_e
264	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_PLUMB_FULL}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF} ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_REF}"
265	  buh_line "   Full ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} display — ${RBYC_SBOM} packages, build parameters,"
266	  buh_line "   Dockerfile content."
267	  buh_e
268	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_PLUMB_COMPACT}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF} ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_REF}"
269	  buh_line "   Compact summary — one-line-per-artifact overview."
270	  buh_e
271	
272	  buh_step1 "${RBYC_SUMMON} the ${RBYC_HALLMARK}"
273	  buh_e
274	  buh_line "${RBYC_SUMMON} pulls a set of images affiliated with a"
275	  buh_line "${RBYC_HALLMARK} that has been ${RBYC_VOUCHED} to your local"
276	  buh_line "Docker image cache:"
277	  buh_e
278	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_SUMMON_HALLMARK}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF} ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_REF}"
279	  buh_e
280	  buyy_cmd_yawp "{hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"; local -r z_sfx_img2="${z_buym_yelp}"
281	  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_img2}"
282	  buh_line "   is a multiplatform manifest list."
283	  buh_line "   Docker resolves it to the image matching your host"
284	  buh_line "   architecture — the same image that ${RBYC_CHARGE} uses when"
285	  buh_line "   starting a ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} from cloud-built ${RBYC_HALLMARKS}."
286	  buh_e
287	
288	  if test "${z_conjure_summoned}" = "1"; then
289	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${RBYC_CONJURED} ${RBYC_SENTRY} image found locally (via ${RBYC_SUMMON})"
290	  else
291	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}No ${RBYC_CONJURED} ${RBYC_SENTRY} image found locally — run ${RBYC_SUMMON} above"
292	  fi
293	  buh_e
294	
295	  buh_step1 "${RBYC_ABJURE} and ${RBYC_REKON} — ${RBYC_HALLMARK} lifecycle"
296	  buh_e
297	  buh_line "${RBYC_REKON} lists the raw tags for a ${RBYC_VESSEL}"
298	  buh_line "package in GAR. Run it before and after ${RBYC_ABJURE} to see"
299	  buh_line "the full lifecycle:"
300	  buh_e
301	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_REKON_IMAGE}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF}"
302	  buh_e
303	  buh_line "You should see all five durable tags for your ${RBYC_HALLMARK}:"
304	  buyy_cmd_yawp "${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}, ${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}, ${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_VOUCH}, ${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_POUCH}, ${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_DIAGS}"; local -r z_sfx_list="${z_buym_yelp}"
305	  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_list}"
306	  buh_e
307	  buh_line "${RBYC_ABJURE} removes all artifacts for a ${RBYC_HALLMARK}"
308	  buh_line "from GAR. This is permanent — the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} and all its"
309	  buh_line "tags are deleted:"
310	  buh_e
311	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_ABJURE_HALLMARK}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF} ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_REF}"
312	  buh_e
313	  buh_line "After ${RBYC_ABJURE}, run ${RBYC_REKON} again:"
314	  buh_e
315	  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_REKON_IMAGE}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF}"
316	  buh_e
317	  buh_line "The tags for your ${RBYC_HALLMARK} should be gone. The image is no"
318	  buh_line "longer in the ${RBYC_DEPOT}."
319	  buh_e
320	
321	  buh_section "What you learned"
322	  buh_e
323	  buh_line "You just completed the full ${RBYC_CONJURE} lifecycle:"
324	  buh_e
325	  buh_line "  1. ${RBYC_RELIQUARY} — builder toolchain provisioned"
326	  buh_line "  2. ${RBYC_CONJURE} — ${RBYC_VESSEL} built by Cloud Build with SLSA ${RBYC_PROVENANCE}"
327	  buh_line "  3. ${RBYC_TALLY}/${RBYC_VOUCH} — health and ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} verified"
328	  buh_line "  4. ${RBYC_PLUMB} — ${RBYC_SBOM} and build info inspected"
329	  buh_line "  5. ${RBYC_SUMMON} — consumer image pulled locally"
330	  buh_line "  6. ${RBYC_ABJURE}/${RBYC_REKON} — lifecycle cleanup"
331	  buh_e
332	  buh_line "This was a ${RBYC_TETHERED} build — Cloud Build had"
333	  buh_line "internet access. The next track teaches you to remove"
334	  buh_line "that dependency entirely."
335	  buh_e
336	
337	  buh_tt "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
338	  buh_e
339	}
340	
341	# eof
342

#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# Recipe Bottle Handbook Onboarding - Director First Cloud Build

set -euo pipefail

test -z "${ZRBHODF_SOURCED:-}" || return 0
ZRBHODF_SOURCED=1

rbho_director_first_build() {
  zrbho_sentinel

  buc_doc_brief "Your First Cloud Build — inscribe, conjure, tour, summon, abjure"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  local -r z_vessel="rbev-sentry-deb-tether"

  local z_has_director=0
  local z_secrets_dir=""
  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
    z_secrets_dir=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_SECRETS_DIR") || z_secrets_dir=""
  fi
  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" && \
     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_director}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"; then
    z_has_director=1
  fi

  local z_has_depot=0
  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
    local z_line=""
    while IFS= read -r z_line; do
      case "${z_line}" in RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID=?*) z_has_depot=1; break ;; esac
    done < "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"
  fi

  local z_conjure_summoned=0
  if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    local z_project_id=""
    local z_region=""
    if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
      z_project_id=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID") || z_project_id=""
      z_region=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_GCP_REGION") || z_region=""
    fi
    if test -n "${z_region}" && test -n "${z_project_id}"; then
      local -r z_gar_prefix="${z_region}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${z_project_id}/"
      local -r z_df_out="${ZRBHO_DOCKER_IMAGES_PREFIX}5_repotag.txt"
      local -r z_df_err="${ZRBHO_DOCKER_STDERR_PREFIX}7_repotag.txt"
      if docker images --format "{{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}}" \
           > "${z_df_out}" 2>"${z_df_err}"; then
        local z_line=""
        while IFS= read -r z_line || test -n "${z_line}"; do
          case "${z_line}" in
            "${z_gar_prefix}"*"${z_vessel}:c"[0-9]*) z_conjure_summoned=1; break ;;
          esac
        done < "${z_df_out}"
      fi
    fi
  fi

  buyy_link_yawp "${RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL}" "Vessel" "${z_vessel}"; local -r z_lk_vessel_name="${z_buym_yelp}"

  buh_section "Your First Cloud Build"
  buh_e
  buh_line "This track walks you through the complete ${RBYC_CONJURE} lifecycle:"
  buh_line "provision the builder toolchain, ${RBYC_ORDAIN} your first ${RBYC_VESSEL} via"
  buh_line "Cloud Build, inspect the result, pull it locally, and clean up."
  buh_e
  buh_line "You will build ${z_lk_vessel_name} — the same ${RBYC_SENTRY} you"
  buh_line "already know from the ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} track, but this time built by"
  buh_line "Google Cloud Build with full SLSA ${RBYC_PROVENANCE}."
  buh_e

  buh_line "Prerequisites:"
  buh_e
  if test "${z_has_director}" = "1"; then
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${RBYC_DIRECTOR} credential installed"
  else
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}${RBYC_DIRECTOR} credential missing — run:"
    buh_tt "      " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_CRED_DIRECTOR}"
  fi
  if test "${z_has_depot}" = "1"; then
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${RBYC_DEPOT} configured (RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID populated)"
  else
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}${RBYC_DEPOT} not configured — the ${RBYC_PAYOR} must establish the ${RBYC_DEPOT}:"
    buh_tt "      " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_PAYOR_HB}"
  fi
  buh_e

  if test "${z_has_director}" = "0" || test "${z_has_depot}" = "0"; then
    buh_error "Complete the prerequisites above before continuing."
    buh_e
    buh_tt "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
    buh_e
    return 0
  fi

  buh_line "Configure this handbook session:"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   export ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_NAME}=${z_vessel}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "This sets the ${RBYC_VESSEL} you will build throughout the track."
  buh_line "The remaining steps reference it by name."
  buh_e

  buh_step_style "Step " " — "

  buh_step1 "Inscribe the ${RBYC_RELIQUARY}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "The ${RBYC_RELIQUARY} is a set of builder tool images (skopeo,"
  buh_line "docker, gcloud, syft) that Cloud Build uses during ${RBYC_VESSEL}"
  buh_line "construction. Without it, the ${RBYC_CONJURE} preflight check fails."
  buh_e
  buh_line "Think of it as installing the toolchain before your first build."
  buh_line "This is a one-time operation — once inscribed, the ${RBYC_RELIQUARY}"
  buh_line "stays in the ${RBYC_DEPOT} until you choose to refresh it."
  buh_e
  buh_line "Periodically re-inscribe to pick up newer tool versions. All ${RBYC_VESSELS}"
  buh_line "share the same ${RBYC_RELIQUARY} — one inscribe updates the toolchain"
  buh_line "for every build."
  buh_e
  buh_line "Inscribe:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_INSCRIBE_RELIQUARY}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "This mirrors four tool images from upstream into the ${RBYC_DEPOT}"
  buh_line "GAR namespace. Takes 2-5 minutes depending on network speed."
  buh_e
  buyy_cmd_yawp "r260324193326";                   local -r z_ds_example="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buh_line "When inscribe completes, it prints a ${RBYC_RELIQUARY} datestamp"
  buh_line "(e.g., ${z_ds_example}). Every ${RBYC_VESSEL} that uses Cloud Build"
  buh_line "needs this value in its ${RBYC_REGIME} file:"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   RBRV_RELIQUARY=<datestamp>"
  buh_e
  buyy_cmd_yawp "${z_vessel}/rbrv.env"; local -r z_rbrv_file="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buh_line "Open ${z_rbrv_file} and set the field,"
  buh_line "then commit the change."
  buh_e

  buh_step1 "${RBYC_CONJURE} the ${RBYC_SENTRY}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_CONJURE} is the build mode where Cloud Build constructs a"
  buh_line "${RBYC_VESSEL} image from the project's Dockerfile and build context."
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_ORDAIN} is the command that triggers the full pipeline —"
  buh_line "it reads the ${RBYC_VESSEL} ${RBYC_RBRV} ${RBYC_REGIME} to determine the mode"
  buh_line "(${RBYC_CONJURE}, ${RBYC_BIND}, or ${RBYC_GRAFT}) and acts accordingly:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "This builds on the ${RBYC_TETHERED} pool — Cloud Build has"
  buh_line "public internet access and pulls base images from upstream"
  buh_line "registries during the build. (The ${RBYC_AIRGAP} track removes"
  buh_line "that dependency.)"
  buh_e
  buh_line "The pipeline:"
  buh_e
  buh_line "  1. The host mints a ${RBYC_HALLMARK} — a timestamped tag"
  buh_line "     identifying this build"
  buh_line "  2. A ${RBYC_POUCH} (build context archive) is pushed to GAR"
  buh_line "  3. Cloud Build constructs the image across platforms"
  buh_line "  4. SLSA ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} is generated per platform digest"
  buh_line "  5. ${RBYC_VOUCH} verifies the ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} chain"
  buh_e
  buh_warn "Wall-clock: ~15-20 minutes for a 3-platform build."
  buh_line "The command blocks until Cloud Build finishes. Use the time"
  buh_line "to read ahead — the next steps explain what to look for."
  buh_e

  buh_step1 "Capture the ${RBYC_HALLMARK}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "When ${RBYC_ORDAIN} completes, it writes the ${RBYC_HALLMARK}"
  buh_line "to the ${RBYC_OUTPUT} directory — a fixed-path staging area"
  buh_line "that each ${RBYC_TABTARGET} clears and recreates on entry."
  buh_line "Read the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} from the fact file and export it so"
  buh_line "you can copy-paste the commands in the remaining steps:"
  buh_e
  buh_code "   export ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_NAME}=\$(cat ${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/${RBF_FACT_HALLMARK})"
  buh_e

  buh_step1 "Tour the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} artifacts"
  buh_e
  buh_line "Every ${RBYC_CONJURED} ${RBYC_HALLMARK} produces a set of tagged"
  buh_line "artifacts in GAR. Each suffix serves a specific role:"
  buh_e
  buyy_cmd_yawp "{hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_POUCH}";        local -r z_sfx_pouch="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_cmd_yawp "{hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}";        local -r z_sfx_image="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_cmd_yawp "{hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ATTEST}-{arch}"; local -r z_sfx_attest="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_cmd_yawp "{hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}";        local -r z_sfx_about="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_cmd_yawp "{hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_VOUCH}";        local -r z_sfx_vouch="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buyy_cmd_yawp "{hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_DIAGS}";        local -r z_sfx_diags="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_pouch}"
  buh_line "      A FROM SCRATCH OCI image pushed from host to GAR before"
  buh_line "      the build. Contains the Dockerfile, scripts, and"
  buh_line "      configuration Cloud Build needs. Identical for ${RBYC_TETHERED}"
  buh_line "      and ${RBYC_AIRGAP} builds — the pool determines network"
  buh_line "      access, not the ${RBYC_POUCH}."
  buh_e
  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_image}"
  buh_line "      The consumer image — a multiplatform manifest list."
  buh_line "      This is what you pull and run."
  buh_e
  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_attest}"
  buh_line "      Per-platform ${RBYC_PROVENANCE}-carrying image (one per platform)."
  buh_line "      Shares all layers with -image — only the manifest differs."
  buh_line "      These carry the GCB-attested digests used by ${RBYC_VOUCH}."
  buh_e
  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_about}"
  buh_line "      ${RBYC_SBOM} (software bill of materials) + build info."
  buh_e
  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_vouch}"
  buh_line "      SLSA ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} verification record."
  buh_e
  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_diags}"
  buh_line "      Diagnostics from the build."
  buh_e
  buh_line "Inspect them:"
  buh_e

  buh_step2 "${RBYC_TALLY}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_TALLY} lists all ${RBYC_HALLMARKS} and their health state:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_TALLY_HALLMARKS}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "Look for your ${RBYC_HALLMARK} with health state 'vouched' — that"
  buh_line "means SLSA ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} was verified."
  buh_e

  buh_step2 "${RBYC_VOUCH}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_VOUCH} verifies SLSA ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} for each platform"
  buh_line "digest in the ${RBYC_HALLMARK}. The ${RBYC_ORDAIN} pipeline runs ${RBYC_VOUCH}"
  buh_line "automatically. If a build was interrupted before ${RBYC_VOUCH}"
  buh_line "completed, run this to reattempt ${RBYC_VOUCH} on untreated ${RBYC_HALLMARKS}:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_VOUCH_HALLMARKS}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "The ${RBYC_CONJURE} verdict is full SLSA — Cloud Build produced"
  buh_line "this image, and the ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} chain proves it."
  buh_e

  buh_step2 "${RBYC_PLUMB}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_PLUMB} displays the ${RBYC_SBOM}, build info, and Dockerfile"
  buh_line "that produced the ${RBYC_HALLMARK}. Two modes:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_PLUMB_FULL}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF} ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_REF}"
  buh_line "   Full ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} display — ${RBYC_SBOM} packages, build parameters,"
  buh_line "   Dockerfile content."
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_PLUMB_COMPACT}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF} ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_REF}"
  buh_line "   Compact summary — one-line-per-artifact overview."
  buh_e

  buh_step1 "${RBYC_SUMMON} the ${RBYC_HALLMARK}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_SUMMON} pulls a set of images affiliated with a"
  buh_line "${RBYC_HALLMARK} that has been ${RBYC_VOUCHED} to your local"
  buh_line "Docker image cache:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_SUMMON_HALLMARK}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF} ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_REF}"
  buh_e
  buyy_cmd_yawp "{hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"; local -r z_sfx_img2="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_img2}"
  buh_line "   is a multiplatform manifest list."
  buh_line "   Docker resolves it to the image matching your host"
  buh_line "   architecture — the same image that ${RBYC_CHARGE} uses when"
  buh_line "   starting a ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} from cloud-built ${RBYC_HALLMARKS}."
  buh_e

  if test "${z_conjure_summoned}" = "1"; then
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${RBYC_CONJURED} ${RBYC_SENTRY} image found locally (via ${RBYC_SUMMON})"
  else
    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}No ${RBYC_CONJURED} ${RBYC_SENTRY} image found locally — run ${RBYC_SUMMON} above"
  fi
  buh_e

  buh_step1 "${RBYC_ABJURE} and ${RBYC_REKON} — ${RBYC_HALLMARK} lifecycle"
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_REKON} lists the raw tags for a ${RBYC_VESSEL}"
  buh_line "package in GAR. Run it before and after ${RBYC_ABJURE} to see"
  buh_line "the full lifecycle:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_REKON_IMAGE}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "You should see all five durable tags for your ${RBYC_HALLMARK}:"
  buyy_cmd_yawp "${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}, ${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}, ${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_VOUCH}, ${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_POUCH}, ${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_DIAGS}"; local -r z_sfx_list="${z_buym_yelp}"
  buh_line "   ${z_sfx_list}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "${RBYC_ABJURE} removes all artifacts for a ${RBYC_HALLMARK}"
  buh_line "from GAR. This is permanent — the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} and all its"
  buh_line "tags are deleted:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_ABJURE_HALLMARK}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF} ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_HALLMARK_REF}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "After ${RBYC_ABJURE}, run ${RBYC_REKON} again:"
  buh_e
  buh_tt "   " "${RBZ_REKON_IMAGE}" "" " ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_VESSEL_REF}"
  buh_e
  buh_line "The tags for your ${RBYC_HALLMARK} should be gone. The image is no"
  buh_line "longer in the ${RBYC_DEPOT}."
  buh_e

  buh_section "What you learned"
  buh_e
  buh_line "You just completed the full ${RBYC_CONJURE} lifecycle:"
  buh_e
  buh_line "  1. ${RBYC_RELIQUARY} — builder toolchain provisioned"
  buh_line "  2. ${RBYC_CONJURE} — ${RBYC_VESSEL} built by Cloud Build with SLSA ${RBYC_PROVENANCE}"
  buh_line "  3. ${RBYC_TALLY}/${RBYC_VOUCH} — health and ${RBYC_PROVENANCE} verified"
  buh_line "  4. ${RBYC_PLUMB} — ${RBYC_SBOM} and build info inspected"
  buh_line "  5. ${RBYC_SUMMON} — consumer image pulled locally"
  buh_line "  6. ${RBYC_ABJURE}/${RBYC_REKON} — lifecycle cleanup"
  buh_e
  buh_line "This was a ${RBYC_TETHERED} build — Cloud Build had"
  buh_line "internet access. The next track teaches you to remove"
  buh_line "that dependency entirely."
  buh_e

  buh_tt "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
  buh_e
}

# eof

1	#!/bin/bash
2	#
3	# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
4	#
5	# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
6	# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
7	# You may obtain a copy of the License at
8	#
9	#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
10	#
11	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
12	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle Handbook Onboarding - Tadmor Security Evaluation
20	
21	set -euo pipefail
22	
23	test -z "${ZRBHOTS_SOURCED:-}" || return 0
24	ZRBHOTS_SOURCED=1
25	
26	# Evaluator-intimate top/tail; mechanical middle delegates to
27	# rbhoct_crucible_trunk + rbhocq_crucible_quench.
28	#
29	# No cloud-build or global-suite references — this handbook teaches
30	# the local adversarial loop against kludged hallmarks. Airgap/moriah
31	# coverage belongs in Building for Crucibles, not here.
32	
33	rbho_tadmor_security() {
34	  zrbho_sentinel
35	
36	  buc_doc_brief "Verify Crucible containment under attack — charge tadmor and run the adversarial suite"
37	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
38	
39	  local -r z_moniker="tadmor"
40	  local -r z_sentry_vessel="rbev-sentry-deb-tether"
41	  local -r z_bottle_vessel="rbev-bottle-ifrit-tether"
42	  local -r z_nameplate_file="${RBBC_dot_dir}/${z_moniker}/${RBCC_rbrn_file}"
43	
44	  local z_has_docker=0
45	  command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 && z_has_docker=1
46	
47	  buh_section "Verify ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} Containment Under Attack"
48	  buh_e
49	  buh_line "You are evaluating whether ${RBYC_RECIPE_BOTTLE}'s sandbox holds up"
50	  buh_line "when something inside actively tries to escape. This track walks"
51	  buh_line "you through building a ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} locally and running an"
52	  buh_line "adversarial suite — 34 cases authored against the containment"
53	  buh_line "primitives — to verify each attack fails as designed."
54	  buh_e
55	  buh_line "This track uses the ${z_moniker} ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE}: the same ${RBYC_SENTRY}"
56	  buh_line "as the explorer track, paired with a ${RBYC_BOTTLE} that carries"
57	  buh_line "the ${RBYC_IFRIT} attack binary. The ${RBYC_BOTTLE} is a hostile workload"
58	  buh_line "that attempts escape, not a friendly one."
59	  buh_e
60	  buh_line "What you will see: each attack is both an attempt AND the observed"
61	  buh_line "response. A pass means the attack ran and was contained; the"
62	  buh_line "output shows you exactly what the ${RBYC_SENTRY} blocked and how."
63	  buh_e
64	
65	  buh_line "Configure this handbook session:"
66	  buh_e
67	  buh_code "   export ${RBYC_HANDBOOK_NAMEPLATE_NAME}=${z_moniker}"
68	  buh_e
69	  buh_line "The kludge and commit commands below reference this ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE}"
70	  buh_line "by name. Export once and paste freely."
71	  buh_e
72	
73	  if test "${z_has_docker}" = "0"; then
74	    buh_error "Docker is not available on this machine."
75	    buh_line  "Install Docker Desktop (or dockerd in WSL) and re-run this handbook."
76	    buh_e
77	    buh_tt  "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
78	    buh_e
79	    return 0
80	  fi
81	
82	  rbhoct_crucible_trunk "${z_moniker}" "${z_sentry_vessel}" "${z_bottle_vessel}" "${z_nameplate_file}"
83	
84	  buh_step1 "Tour the containment architecture"
85	  buh_e
86	  buh_line "The ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} is three containers with distinct roles, structured"
87	  buh_line "for defense-in-depth. An attack that bypasses one layer still has"
88	  buh_line "to defeat the next."
89	  buh_e
90	
91	  buh_step2 "${RBYC_SENTRY} layer — network policy enforcement"
92	  buh_e
93	  buh_line "The ${RBYC_SENTRY} runs two enforcement layers:"
94	  buh_e
95	  buh_line "  iptables  — packet filter in the kernel. Drops traffic to any IP"
96	  buh_line "              outside the CIDR allowlist. Applied before any"
97	  buh_line "              routing decision the workload can make."
98	  buh_e
99	  buh_line "  dnsmasq   — DNS resolver. Returns answers only for allowlisted"
100	  buh_line "              domain names. Non-allowlisted queries fail to"
101	  buh_line "              resolve, so the workload cannot get an IP to"
102	  buh_line "              connect to in the first place."
103	  buh_e
104	  buh_line "Both layers must agree for traffic to pass. Neither by itself is"
105	  buh_line "sufficient — iptables alone cannot stop IP-literal exfiltration to"
106	  buh_line "an allowlisted CIDR; dnsmasq alone cannot stop queries bypassing"
107	  buh_line "the local resolver. The pair closes both paths."
108	  buh_e
109	  buh_line "If either layer fails silently, the other holds the line — the"
110	  buh_line "adversarial suite exercises this directly."
111	  buh_e
112	
113	  buh_step2 "${RBYC_PENTACLE} layer — namespace ownership"
114	  buh_e
115	  buh_line "The ${RBYC_PENTACLE} is a dedicated container that owns the network"
116	  buh_line "namespace shared with the ${RBYC_BOTTLE}. The ${RBYC_BOTTLE} attaches"
117	  buh_line "to this namespace at ${RBYC_CHARGE} time; it never owns network"
118	  buh_line "primitives itself."
119	  buh_e
120	  buh_line "Why not give the ${RBYC_BOTTLE} its own namespace? If the ${RBYC_BOTTLE}"
121	  buh_line "could modify its own network state, escape attempts would target"
122	  buh_line "those primitives directly. Isolating namespace ownership into a"
123	  buh_line "separate container puts the mutable network state out of reach"
124	  buh_line "from anything running inside the ${RBYC_BOTTLE}."
125	  buh_e
126	
127	  buh_step2 "${RBYC_BOTTLE} layer — unprivileged workload"
128	  buh_e
129	  buh_line "The ${RBYC_BOTTLE} itself runs as an unprivileged user with no"
130	  buh_line "network capabilities. iptables manipulation would need CAP_NET_ADMIN;"
131	  buh_line "namespace modification would need CAP_SYS_ADMIN; raw sockets would"
132	  buh_line "need CAP_NET_RAW. None are present."
133	  buh_e
134	  buh_line "The three layers compose: ${RBYC_SENTRY} enforces policy, ${RBYC_PENTACLE}"
135	  buh_line "owns the namespace, ${RBYC_BOTTLE} runs the workload without the"
136	  buh_line "primitives required to bypass either layer above."
137	  buh_e
138	
139	  buh_step1 "Meet ${RBYC_IFRIT} and ${RBYC_THEURGE}"
140	  buh_e
141	  buh_line "${RBYC_IFRIT} is the attack binary. It lives inside the bottle-ifrit image"
142	  buh_line "and carries a catalog of containment-violation attempts — DNS"
143	  buh_line "tunneling, IP-literal exfiltration, raw socket use, namespace"
144	  buh_line "escape, filesystem breakout, and similar primitives."
145	  buh_e
146	  buh_line "Claude Code sessions with full visibility into ${RBYC_RECIPE_BOTTLE}'s"
147	  buh_line "internals authored the suite. Each attack was designed against a"
148	  buh_line "known containment boundary, with the explicit goal of finding a"
149	  buh_line "gap. The cases preserve the reasoning for each attempt — you can"
150	  buh_line "read them as an evaluator, not just run them."
151	  buh_e
152	  buh_line "${RBYC_THEURGE} coordinates the test. It runs outside the ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE}"
153	  buh_line "and orchestrates each case: ${RBYC_CHARGE} the ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE},"
154	  buh_line "dispatch ${RBYC_IFRIT} to attempt one attack, observe the attack's"
155	  buh_line "behavior inside the ${RBYC_BOTTLE} AND the ${RBYC_SENTRY}'s response"
156	  buh_line "from outside, compare against expected."
157	  buh_e
158	  buh_line "A case passes when the attack ran AND the sandbox responded as"
159	  buh_line "designed. The output is not 'did the test pass' — it is 'what"
160	  buh_line "did ${RBYC_IFRIT} try, and what stopped it'."
161	  buh_e
162	
163	  buh_step1 "Run the security suite"
164	  buh_e
165	  buh_line "The full ${z_moniker} fixture runs all 34 cases against the ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE}"
166	  buh_line "you just charged:"
167	  buh_e
168	  buh_tt  "   " "rbtd-r" "${z_moniker}"
169	  buh_e
170	  buh_line "Expect green across the board. A red case surfaces either a"
171	  buh_line "containment regression or a test that needs updating against a"
172	  buh_line "primitive that changed — both warrant attention."
173	  buh_e
174	  buh_line "For iterative debugging or a deep-dive on a single attack, run"
175	  buh_line "one case against an already-charged ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE}:"
176	  buh_e
177	  buh_tt  "   " "rbtd-s" "${z_moniker}" " [case-name]"
178	  buh_e
179	  buh_line "Omit the case name to list all 34. Useful when investigating a"
180	  buh_line "specific failure without re-running the full fixture."
181	  buh_e
182	  buh_line "Reading results:"
183	  buh_e
184	  buh_line "  green    — the attack ran to completion and the sandbox"
185	  buh_line "             response matched expected containment behavior."
186	  buh_e
187	  buh_line "  red      — the attack either succeeded (containment gap) or"
188	  buh_line "             failed in an unexpected way (test drift)."
189	  buh_e
190	  buh_line "  per-case — output shows what ${RBYC_IFRIT} tried, what the ${RBYC_SENTRY}"
191	  buh_line "             logged, and how the assertion compared the two."
192	  buh_e
193	
194	  rbhocq_crucible_quench "${z_moniker}"
195	
196	  buh_section "What you evaluated"
197	  buh_e
198	  buh_line "You exercised the complete containment suite against a local"
199	  buh_line "${RBYC_CRUCIBLE}. What the results tell you:"
200	  buh_e
201	  buh_line "  - Defense-in-depth holds against 34 distinct attack primitives"
202	  buh_line "  - The ${RBYC_SENTRY}'s dual enforcement closes both IP-literal"
203	  buh_line "    and DNS-based exfiltration paths"
204	  buh_line "  - Namespace isolation and unprivileged-user discipline prevent"
205	  buh_line "    the ${RBYC_BOTTLE} from modifying its own network state"
206	  buh_e
207	  buh_line "The adversarial suite is live infrastructure — it must stay green"
208	  buh_line "as the codebase evolves. Changes that affect containment are"
209	  buh_line "gated on it passing."
210	  buh_e
211	  buh_line "What you ran locally against kludged ${RBYC_HALLMARKS} is the same"
212	  buh_line "suite that would run against cloud-built ${RBYC_HALLMARKS} on the"
213	  buh_line "airgap chain. The attack surface is the ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE}; the"
214	  buh_line "build provenance is evaluated separately."
215	  buh_e
216	
217	  buh_tt  "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
218	  buh_e
219	}
220	
221	# eof
222

#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
